nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Eyebrowed heleia
nodes.summary: The eyebrowed heleia (Heleia superciliaris), also known as the cream-browed white-eye, cream-browed ibon or yellow-browed white-eye, is a species of bird in the white-eye family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the Lesser Sunda Islands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References

nodes.name: Heleia
